p2p_enrich.notes: Docker build successful. CI/CD analysis: Repo uses ruff for linting/formatting (style.yaml), pytest for unit tests (cpu_tests.yaml). Existing p2p tests in test_outputs.py: test_repo_ruff_check (ruff check src/prime_rl/utils/monitor), test_repo_ruff_format (ruff format --check src/prime_rl/utils/monitor). All 13 tests pass (6 p2p + 7 f2p). The ruff checks are the primary CI gates that work without heavy dependencies (transformers, vllm, wandb).

validate.notes: All validation checks passed. Docker build OK. NOP test correctly fails (reward=0) on base commit without log_eval_samples. Gold test passes (reward=1) with solution patch applied. Removed unreasonable rubric rule about errors passing silently - the gold solution try/except in MultiMonitor is intentional fault-tolerance design explicitly allowed by AGENTS.md. Fixed judge.py to return 1.0 when no rubric rules exist.
